nasb.text: “Go and speak to Hananiah, saying, ‘Thus says the Lord, “You have broken the yokes of wood, but you have made instead of them yokes of iron.”

esv.text: “Go, tell Hananiah, ‘Thus says the Lord: You have broken wooden bars, but you have made in their place bars of iron.

cnv.text: “你去告訴哈拿尼雅說：‘耶和華這樣說：你折斷了木軛，卻要換來鐵軛。

ccb.text: “你去告诉哈拿尼雅，耶和华说，‘你折断了木轭，却要换来铁轭。
